nasb.text: From there they went out and began to go through Galilee, and He did not want anyone to know about it.

esv.text: They went on from there and passed through Galilee. And he did not want anyone to know,

cnv.text: 他們從那裡出去，經過加利利，耶穌不想讓人知道，

ccb.text: 他们离开那里，途经加利利。耶稣不想任何人知道祂的行踪，

csbs.text: 他们离开那里，经过加利利，耶稣不愿意让人知道。
